About

A young studio built on curiosity, craft, and AI.

Hi, I'm Abu Horaiya — an 18-year-old student, graphic designer, and AI enthusiast.

I turn ideas into reality through creativity and technology — designing visuals, building AI-powered workflows, and creating modern websites. Every project is a chance to solve real problems and deliver work that's reliable, modern, and tailored to the client.
